channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Deadly Russian strikes hit Kyiv as Zelenskyy appeals to US for urgent help
item.description: More than a dozen people were killed and over 100 injured in a large-scale overnight Russian missile and drone strike on Ukraine, officials said.

item.title: Usha Vance calls for respect toward Supreme Court and federal judges
item.description: The second lady expressed surprise at President Trump's sense of humor.

item.title: Russian missile and drone attack kills at least 13 in Ukraine, officials report
item.description: Russian missile and drone strikes kill at least 13 across Ukraine, after Zelenskyy warned of a planned massive assault.

item.title: Senior Iranian officer says renewed war with U.S. appears inevitable
item.description: Prospects for a U.S.-Iran deal dim as the Israel-Hezbollah war continues, despite Trump claiming an agreement to stop fighting.
